seoTitle: Cangai vs Canley Heights — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cangai and Canley Heights. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cangai vs Canley Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cangai and Canley Heights.
heading: Cangai vs Canley Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cangai, New South Wales and Canley Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cangai has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Canley Heights (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cangai or Canley Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cangai has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Canley Heights scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cangai scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Canley Heights scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cangai or Canley Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cangai has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
